stemHtml: Which of the following is an advantage of an MMR in an aircraft?

options.a: It automatically identifies and connects to nearby navigation aids.
options.b: It integrates multiple functions in a single instrument and saves space in the cockpit.
options.c: It allows the aircraft to use signals from ILS, GLS, MLS and GNSS simultaneously.
options.d: A single receiver can process signals from GPS, GALILEO, GLONASS and BeiDou.
